frame_analyses.description: Both scissors positioned above gauze with circular pattern marked in red dashed lines
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Gauze appears properly suspended between clamps, clear marking visible

frame_analyses.description: Right scissors making first incision at top of circle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Initial entry point appears close to marked line

frame_analyses.description: Cutting progressing clockwise around circle, approximately at 2 o'clock position
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth cutting motion, staying close to line

frame_analyses.description: Continuing clockwise cut, now at approximately 4 o'clock position
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Cut appears to deviate slightly outside line at this position

frame_analyses.description: Cut progressing to bottom of circle, approximately 6 o'clock position
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Some deviation from line visible, cut appears ragged

frame_analyses.description: Cutting around left side of circle, approximately 9 o'clock position
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Multiple deviations visible, some areas cut well outside marked line

frame_analyses.description: Nearing completion of circle, approaching 12 o'clock starting point
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Final portion shows improvement in line adherence

frame_analyses.description: Circle cut completed, circular piece removed from gauze
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task completed, gauze remains attached to clamps

penalties.description: Deviation from marked line at 3 o'clock position, approximately 3mm outside
Deviation from marked line at 6 o'clock position, approximately 2mm outside
Multiple deviations on left side of circle, estimated 4mm total deviation

confidence_rationale: Deviation measurements estimated from oblique camera angle. Some areas of the cut are partially obscured by instrument shadows. Time estimation based on visible cutting progression.
cannot_determine: Exact mm measurements at all cardinal points due to camera angle
Precise deviation measurements in shadowed areas of frames 13-14
technique_summary: Intermediate level performance with acceptable time but significant line deviations. Cutting technique shows some inconsistency with better precision in final quarter of circle.
improvement_suggestions: Focus on maintaining closer adherence to marked line throughout entire cut
Consider slower, more deliberate cutting in challenging curve sections
Practice consistent hand positioning to minimize deviation
